title: Release Record
description: The record of a versioned release of platform-compliance. A release cannot be tagged until this record exists and the release gate assessment passes. Lives in 09-assessments/releases/v{VERSION}.yaml. Links the release tag to the compliance evidence.

id.description: Semantic version string matching the Git tag. Format: v{MAJOR}.{MINOR}.{PATCH}.

change_record_ids.description: All change record IDs included in this release.

gate_assessment_id.description: Assessment report ID for the release gate evaluation. The referenced report must have overall_result: pass or pass-with-waivers.

release_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this release contains.

breaking_changes.description: Whether any included change record has breaking: true.

migration_guide.description: Required when breaking_changes is true. Instructions for downstream repositories.
